user.title: DigiSpark HA Agent
user.description: Connect the agent to a model provider.

data.extra_headers: Extra inference headers (one "Name: value" per line)

model.title: Model
model.description: Pick a model. The list is fetched live from the provider; if it could not be fetched, enter a model id.

error.api_key_required: An API key is required for this provider.
error.invalid_host: Enter the local backend as an http(s) URL.
error.cleartext_remote_host: Cleartext http is only allowed for local hosts; use https for remote backends.
error.invalid_base_url: Enter the custom endpoint as an http(s) URL.
error.cleartext_remote_base_url: Cleartext http is only allowed for local endpoints; use https for remote gateways.
error.credential_header_required: The custom_header credential kind needs a header name.
error.invalid_extra_headers: Extra headers must be one "Name: value" per line; credential and protocol headers are not allowed here.
